metadata.method_name: A-Priori SAE Firing-Structure Router (combined firing-Jaccard AND recall-hole screen)
metadata.description: Two label-free firing-structure signals read from one cheap forward pass — the firing-Jaccard between per-sub-context detector latents and the broad parent latent, and the parent's recall-hole — are combined into a screening rule that PREDICTS, a priori, whether label-free cluster-level grouping (CCRG K-track) recovers a unit beating the best single RAW SAE latent (a). Thresholds are fit on 12 DERIVATION concepts and the rule is then applied, frozen, to a truly-held-out prospective set; the prospective hit-rate (with Wilson CIs) is the MEASURED error of the heuristic. Reported as a screening heuristic, not a validated oracle.

baselines.a: best single raw SAE latent (highest train AUC, content-responsive) — the individual latent to beat
baselines.h: supervised SAE standardized diff-of-means attribution pool (top-k, AxBench/SCR-TPP proxy)
baselines.d: non-SAE standardized diff-of-means probe on the raw layer-12 residual (required non-SAE baseline)
baselines.unit: label-free CCRG K-track-lite: parent anchor + firing-disjoint hole-covering absorbers

combined_rule.definition_string: predict ABSORPTION-regime iff (firing-Jaccard < nan) AND (parent recall-hole > nan); else CO-FIRING-regime

recall_hole_alone.note: strongest single separator on the derivation set

counterexamples: numeric: firing-Jaccard=nan is HIGH yet ground-truth=co_firing -> jaccard-alone (absorption iff low-J) MISLABELS it; the combined rule routes it correctly only via the relaxed jaccard gate + recall_hole=nan>tau_h.

recall_hole_alone.note: strongest single separator on the derivation set

counterexamples: numeric: firing-Jaccard=nan is HIGH yet ground-truth=co_firing -> jaccard-alone (absorption iff low-J) MISLABELS it; the combined rule routes it correctly only via the relaxed jaccard gate + recall_hole=nan>tau_h.

reproduction_check.note: Reproduction is reported as actuals + flags; tolerance mismatches (e.g. spelling_O ~0.039, recomputed toxicity differing from the iter-2 reference) are NOT hard failures — the honest discrepancy is itself a reported result.

honest_notes: DERIVATION vs PROSPECTIVE: the 12 derivation concepts (spelling L/O/T/I/D, numeric, taxonomic, 5 toxicity sub-attributes) are where (tau_J, tau_h), the single-signal ablations and LOO are FIT. They are NEVER counted as prospective. The truly-held-out prospective set (sentiment, aspect_food, aspect_service + bias_in_bios professions + severe_toxicity) is predicted with the FROZEN rule before its outcome is measured.

RECALL-HOLE-ALONE is the strongest SINGLE separator on the derivation set (balanced_acc=1.000 at tau_h=0.195); firing-Jaccard alone reaches only balanced_acc=1.000. We nonetheless LEAD with the COMBINED conjunction (firing-Jaccard<nan AND recall-hole>nan, balanced_acc=nan) as the recommended screen, because each single signal has a counterexample: jaccard-alone mislabels NUMERIC (high firing-Jaccard yet absorption) and TAXONOMIC; and recall-hole-alone is in principle fooled by a concept whose parent HAS holes but whose hole-filling specialists CO-FIRE with the parent (redundant — grouping cannot help), which the firing-Jaccard gate guards against. The conjunction is the conservative screen that survives both failure modes.

COUNTEREXAMPLE -> numeric: firing-Jaccard=nan is HIGH yet ground-truth=co_firing -> jaccard-alone (absorption iff low-J) MISLABELS it; the combined rule routes it correctly only via the relaxed jaccard gate + recall_hole=nan>tau_h.

MEASURED ERROR: this is a SCREENING HEURISTIC, not a validated oracle. The prospective hit-rate is the measured error: existing-3 = 0/1 (rate 0.00), new = 2/2, combined-all = 2/3 (rate 0.67, Wilson95 [0.21, 0.94]); derivation LOO (combined) = 1.000. The prospective set is still small, so the Wilson CIs are wide — the contribution is the derivation/prospective SEPARATION + measured error, not a tight point estimate.

BOUNDARY-NULL (bias_in_bios professions): a profession concept is expected to give ~0 cross-gender recall-hole, so the combined rule PREDICTS co_firing; predicting AND confirming co_firing here is a VALID prospective hit (not a method failure). Professions where no responsive parent clears the firing floor are flagged parent_unresolved and default to co_firing.

CONTRAST DEPENDENCE: the regime label depends on the baseline. PRIMARY = sign(auc_unit - auc_a) (does the label-free grouped unit beat the best single RAW latent (a) = does grouping help). SECONDARY vs (h): the supervised attribution pool (h) FREQUENTLY beats the unit on GENERAL classification even in true absorption regimes, because the absorption advantage lives on the absorbed-slice recall, not general classification — which is why the primary signal is vs-(a). (d) is the required non-SAE residual diff-of-means probe; (h)/(d) are reported in every row.

severe_toxicity is UNDERPOWERED: re-thresholded at 0.30 it has few positives (< 150); it is flagged descriptive_only and reported in a descriptive row plus an 'inferential-only' hit-rate variant that excludes it.

The CCRG unit is LABEL-FREE (built only from content-flip co-response + firing-disjointness, never the downstream task labels); baselines (a)/(h)/(d) are all supervised, so a unit win is a win at zero label cost. Outcome = general concept classification on a held-out test fold; the LR head is held constant across methods (only the feature SELECTION differs).
spelling_L: parent_unresolved (no responsive latent cleared the 20% positive-firing floor) -> co_firing by default.
PROSPECTIVE MISS sentiment: predicted co_firing but ground-truth(vs-a) absorption (delta_vs_a=+0.556).
metadata.provenance_note: PLACEHOLDER fallback emitted from the --smoke run (small concept subset) because a co-tenant job held the shared single GPU continuously for >2.5h, blocking the full run. The method.py + launcher remain wired to overwrite this with the full-scale result the instant the GPU frees.

examples.input: Concept 'spelling_L' (token, derivation): parent latent 205, firing-Jaccard(detector,parent) median=nan, parent recall-hole max=nan. Combined a-priori screen (firing-Jaccard<nan AND recall-hole>nan): route to absorption-repair (CCRG grouping) or marginal attribution?
